senses.definition_dg: Kukala mutu wa kijinga, kutokuwa na achili.

examples.dg: Usijabe, fikiri kpwandza kabila ya kuhenda.
examples.en: Don't be silly, think first before acting.
examples.sw: Usiwe mjinga, fikiria kwanza kabla ya kutenda.

senses.definition_dg: Mila na desturi za kare, mambo ga chijadi.

examples.dg: Kulavya mali kpwa ulozi ni jadi yehu
examples.en: To pay dowry for marriage is our custom
examples.sw: Kutoa mali kwa mila ni desturi yetu.

senses.definition_en: ship, dhow (generally larger than dau but smaller than |f{meli})
senses.definition_dg: Chombo kikpwulu cha kuhendere safari ya baharina.

examples.dg: Jahazi ikahenda safari kpwa siku kumi.
examples.en: The dhow made a voyage for ten days.
examples.sw: Jahazi ilifanya safari kwa siku kumi.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala mutu wa kijinga, kukala na makosa.

examples.en: Don't be silly in front of older people.
examples.sw: Usiwe mjinga mbele ya watu wakubwa.

senses.definition_en: to care, to heed, to honour, to respect
senses.definition_dg: Kujali, kumuangaliya mutu au chitu, kuheshimu.

examples.dg: Jali avyazio kpwa sababu ndiyo atu a muhimu sana.
examples.en: Care for your parents because they are the most important people.
examples.sw: Jali wazazi wako kwa sababu ndio watu wa muhimu sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kubarikiwa, kupata neema kula kpwa Mulungu.

examples.dg: Mchetu jaliwa na Mulungu kpwa kupata ana azima.
examples.en: The woman was blessed by God with healthy children.
examples.sw: Mwanamke alijaliwa na Mungu kupata watoto wazima.

senses.definition_en: to bless, to enable, to favour
senses.definition_dg: Kubariki mutu, kumterya mutu aphahe neema.

examples.en: God blessed him with a baby boy.

senses.definition_dg: Kundi ra atu a ndugu au atu anaoshirikiana, familia.

examples.en: Our family is very large.

equivalents_en: loosely woven basket of plaited grass

senses.definition_en: loosely woven basket of plaited grass
senses.definition_dg: Chibero cha nyasi ambacho chifumwa kpwa nyasi, si kigumu sana.

examples.en: Mother put fruits in the loosely woven basket.

equivalents_en: a dangerous spirit which although 'Arabic' is also pagan
equivalents_sw: pepo wa hatari ambaye ni ya kiarabu lakini siyo ya kiislamu

senses.definition_en: a dangerous spirit which although 'Arabic' is also pagan
senses.definition_sw: pepo wa hatari ambaye ni ya kiarabu lakini siyo ya kiislamu
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya pepo wa hatari ambaye ni wa Chiarabu ela si wa Chiislamu.

examples.dg: Jamba ni pepo ambaye anaaminiwa kpwa mila za kare.
examples.en: Jamba is a spirit that is believed in through old customs.
examples.sw: Jamba ni pepo anayeaminiwa kupitia mila za zamani.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu anayeiya mali ya atu kpwa kutumia silaha, mwivi wa hatari.

examples.en: Armed robbers entered the shop at night.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphiya kulamusa mutu au kumtembelea.

examples.en: We will go visit grandmother tomorrow.

senses.definition_dg: Nchi inayoongozwa ni rais ariyechaguliwa ni atu.

examples.dg: Kenya ni jamhuri, rais anachaguliwa ni atu.
examples.en: Kenya is a republic, the president is elected by the people.
examples.sw: Kenya ni jamhuri, rais anachaguliwa na watu.

senses.definition_dg: Mkeka mkpwulu udzengbwawo na nyasi au makodze.

examples.en: Sit on the mat.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu ambapo kuna mchanga munji na hakuna madzi wala mihi, weruni.

examples.dg: Jangbwani hakuna madzi, ni phatu pha hatari.
examples.en: In the desert there is no water, it is a dangerous place.
examples.sw: Jangwani hakuna maji, ni mahali hatari.

senses.definition_dg: Mwenye ujanja, anayemanya kuiga atu, -janja.

examples.en: A sly person knows how to deceive you.

senses.definition_en: to test, to tempt, to try
senses.definition_dg: Kupima chitu au kujeza kuhenda chitu, kujaribu.

examples.en: Try again, don't give up.

examples.dg: Proverb: Aryarye jashoye kana kondo na mutu
examples.en: Whoever eats his own sweat has no quarrel with anyone else

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya siri ya mwiri wa mchetu.

examples.dg: Hiri ni neno ra chisayansi kuhusu mwiri.
examples.en: This is a scientific term about the body.
examples.sw: Hii ni neno la kisayansi kuhusu mwili.

senses.definition_dg: Dzino kulu ra nyuma ya kanwa ra kusagira chakurya.

examples.en: His molar hurts, he should go to the doctor.

senses.definition_dg: Kudziika kpwenye ukuta au chitu, kuegemea.

examples.dg: Wajejemera ukuta kpwa sababu ya uchovu.
examples.en: He leaned against the wall because of tiredness.
examples.sw: Aliegemea ukuta kwa sababu ya uchovu.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kuwa na utsu-utsu hewani, hali ya joto na mnyevu phamwenga.

examples.en: There is a lot of humidity at the coast.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu pha kufungirwa atu ariotenda makosa, gereza.

examples.en: The thief was sentenced to two years in prison.

equivalents_en: tap a tree for palm wine etc

senses.definition_en: to tap a tree for palm wine etc
senses.definition_dg: Kugema muhi wa mnazi au muhi wa mukindu kuhala phombe ya chijadi.

examples.en: Father went to tap the coconut palm in the morning.

examples.dg: Mila ya kpwehu, mwana mlume achivyalwa, bada ya wiki mwenga nkutuluzwa kondze, nkuonyeswa jembe, uha na phanga
examples.en: A custom of ours is that when a baby boy is born, after one week he is taken outside and shown a hoe, a bow and a machete

equivalents_sw: stretcher (usually stored at a mosque) which is used to

senses.definition_sw: stretcher (usually stored at a mosque) which is used to

senses.definition_dg: Wa kure, asiye wa phano, -jeni.

examples.dg: Mjeni wafika kula tsi ya kure.
examples.en: The stranger arrived from a far country.
examples.sw: Mgeni alifika kutoka nchi ya mbali.

senses.definition_dg: Kutiririka, madzi kuenenda kpwa upande mmwenga.

examples.en: The river water flows fast.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala mkali na kutokuheshimu atu, ukali.

examples.dg: Mutu wa jeuri kasagarirwa ni atu.
examples.en: A brutal person is not tolerated by people.
examples.sw: Mtu wa jeuri havumiliwi na watu.

senses.definition_en: to test, to tempt, to try
senses.definition_dg: Kujeza, kuhenda chitu ili ulole ichikala unaweza, kujaribu.

examples.en: Try again, don't give up.

senses.definition_dg: Kuuyiza maneno kpwa mutu ariyekuuza, kujibu.

examples.en: Answer the teacher's question.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu kulu ya nchi yenye serikali yake, mkoa au jimbo.

examples.en: Our province is very large.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya pepo wa Chiswahili.

examples.dg: Jinamizi ni pepo anayeaminiwa ni atu a pwani.
examples.en: Jinamizi is a spirit believed in by coastal people.
examples.sw: Jinamizi ni pepo anayeaminiwa na watu wa pwani.

equivalents_sw: an 'Arabic' spirit which may be kept and controlled

senses.definition_sw: an 'Arabic' spirit which may be kept and controlled
senses.definition_dg: Pepo wa Chiarabu ambaye anaweza kuikpwa na kutawaliwa ni mutu.

examples.dg: Jine ni pepo ambaye anamanyikana kpwa mila za Chiarabu.
examples.en: A genie is a spirit known in Arabic customs.
examples.sw: Jini ni pepo anayejulikana katika mila za Kiarabu.

sub_entries.definition_en: for either good or bad purposes
sub_entries.definition_sw: they are reputed to drink people's blood and kill a person a few days after possessing his or her body; jini

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya pepo wa kibara, wa tsi za juu.

examples.dg: Jine Simba ni pepo wa kibara.
examples.en: Jine Simba is an upcountry spirit.
examples.sw: Jine Simba ni pepo wa kibara.

equivalents_sw: manner in which something is done; jinsi

senses.definition_sw: manner in which something is done; jinsi

senses.definition_dg: Elimu ya tsongo, nchi na hali ya hewa.

examples.en: The teacher taught geography at school.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu anayeishi phahi-phahi na nyumba yako.

examples.dg: Jirani yehu ni mutu mnono sana.
examples.en: Our neighbor is a very good person.
examples.sw: Jirani yetu ni mtu mzuri sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kupika chakurya kpwa moho.

examples.en: Mother is cooking rice and stew.

equivalents_en: an 'Arabic' spirit which causes drowning at sea
equivalents_sw: pepo wa kiarabu afanyaye baharia atose majini

senses.definition_en: an 'Arabic' spirit which causes drowning at sea
senses.definition_sw: pepo wa kiarabu afanyaye baharia atose majini
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya pepo wa Chiarabu ambaye anahendesa atu kuzama baharina.

examples.dg: Jitu ni pepo anayeogophwa ni wavuvi.
examples.en: Jitu is a spirit feared by fishermen.
examples.sw: Jitu ni pepo anayeogopwa na wavuvi.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kutokuwa na mwanga, giza.

examples.en: Don't go in the dark without a lamp.

senses.definition_dg: Nguo ndefu ya kudziwe ambayo si ya kubana.

examples.en: The elder wore a long cloak at the ceremony.

senses.definition_dg: Mure sana kupita kawaida.

examples.dg: Mutu yuya ni jolo-jolo, mure sana.
examples.en: That person is extraordinarily tall.
examples.sw: Mtu yule ni mrefu kupita kiasi.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya mjusi mwenye mkia wa rangi ya buluu.

examples.dg: Jonjoka anaishi kpwenye mwamba na tsongo.
examples.en: The blue-tailed skink lives among rocks and ground.
examples.sw: Mjusi wa mkia wa buluu anaishi kwenye miamba na ardhini.

sub_entries.definition_sw: aina ya mjusi mwenye miguu mifupi aliyefanana na nyoka

senses.definition_dg: Ugali wa muhogo.

examples.dg: Jora ni chakurya cha kare cha Adigo.
examples.en: Cassava meal is a traditional food of the Digo people.
examples.sw: Ugali wa muhogo ni chakula cha kimila cha Wadigo.

senses.definition_dg: Bidii ya kuhenda kazi, nguvu za kuhenda chitu.

examples.en: Through your effort, you will succeed.

senses.definition_dg: Kazi ambayo mutu anahenderwa na anahenderwa lazima kuihenda.

examples.dg: Jukumu ra avyazi ni kurera ana.
examples.en: The responsibility of parents is to raise children.
examples.sw: Jukumu la wazazi ni kulea watoto.

equivalents_en: kind of rat which lives in forests

senses.definition_en: kind of rat which lives in forests
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya panya wa tsakani anayeishi kpwenye mihi.

examples.dg: Jule ni panya wa tsakani ambaye anarya matunda.
examples.en: Jule is a forest rat that eats fruits.
examples.sw: Jule ni panya wa msituni anayekula matunda.

senses.definition_dg: Siku kulu, neno ra kuonyesa siku fulani ya wiki.

examples.en: One day a celebration was held.

equivalents_en: day (use is limited to questions and answers about which day of the

senses.definition_en: day (use is limited to questions and answers about which day of the
senses.definition_dg: Siku, neno ra kuuza kuhusu siku.

examples.en: What day is today?
Which day is it today?

senses.definition_dg: Siku ya sita ya wiki.

examples.en: On Saturday we will rest at home.

senses.definition_dg: Siku ya pili ya wiki.

examples.dg: Jumanne ni siku ya kpwandza ya kuhenda kazi ya wiki.
examples.en: Tuesday is the first working day of the week.
examples.sw: Jumanne ni siku ya kwanza ya kazi ya wiki.

senses.definition_dg: Siku ya sabaa ya wiki.

examples.en: On Sunday many people go to church.

senses.definition_dg: Siku ya hahu ya wiki.

examples.dg: Jumatano ni siku ya kahi-kahi ya wiki.
examples.en: Wednesday is the middle day of the week.
examples.sw: Jumatano ni siku ya katikati ya wiki.

senses.definition_dg: Siku ya kpwandza ya wiki.

examples.dg: Jumatatu ni siku ya kuandza kazi bada ya wikendi.
examples.en: Monday is the day to start work after the weekend.
examples.sw: Jumatatu ni siku ya kuanza kazi baada ya wikendi.

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa jumula, phamwenga, kpwa osi.

examples.en: In total we were thirty people.

senses.definition_dg: Kusikira vibaya moyoni kpwa dzambo urikorehenda, kujuta.

examples.en: He regretted the bad words he told him.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kusikira vibaya moyoni kpwa makosa urigorehenda.

examples.dg: Ana juto kulu kpwa dzambo arikorihenda.
examples.en: He has great regret for what he did.
examples.sw: Ana juto kubwa kwa jambo alilolifanya.

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa dzulu-dzulu tu, bila kuinjira ndani sana.

examples.en: Don't do the work superficially, do it well.
